LightningComponentBundle.description: Single-selection ICD-10 code typeahead for Screen Flows. Searches the NIH Clinical Tables API live; emits code-only selectedCode plus selectedDescription as separate outputs. Configure per-flow behavior via ICD_Lookup__mdt Custom Metadata.

property.name: uniquenessKey
property.label: 1. Uniqueness Key
property.description: Fill in a unique value across the whole Flow, such as [Field API Name]_{!$Flow.InterviewGuid}, to prevent field values from being lost or mixed up.

property.name: label
property.label: 2. Label
property.description: Label text displayed above the ICD-10 search input.

property.name: mandatory
property.label: 3. Required
property.description: When true, blocks Flow progression if no code is selected. Overridden by ICD_Lookup__mdt.Required__c when Flow API Name is set.

property.name: disabled
property.label: 4. Disabled
property.description: When true, the field is fully disabled and non-interactive - matches standard Flow screen component behavior. Validation is skipped while disabled.

property.name: defaultValue
property.label: 5. Default Value
property.description: Pre-populates the field with an existing ICD-10 code (e.g., from a record). Format must match the output format: CODE: Description.

property.name: flowApiName
property.label: 6. Flow API Name
property.description: API name of the Screen Flow using this component. Used to load configuration from the ICD_Lookup__mdt Custom Metadata Type. Overrides fields 7, 8, and 9 when a matching record exists.

property.name: helpText
property.label: 7. Help Text
property.description: Help text displayed next to the field label via a help icon. Overridden by ICD_Lookup__mdt.Help_Text__c when Flow API Name is set.

property.name: noResultsMessage
property.label: 8. No Results Message
property.description: Message shown when the search returns no results. Defaults to 'No matching codes found.' Overridden by ICD_Lookup__mdt.No_Matching_Codes_Found_Message__c when Flow API Name is set.

property.name: fieldPlaceholder
property.label: 9. Placeholder Text
property.description: Placeholder text inside the search input. Defaults to 'Search by code or description (e.g. Hypertension)'. Overridden by ICD_Lookup__mdt.Field_Placeholder__c when Flow API Name is set.

property.name: selectedCode
property.label: Selected ICD Code
property.description: The selected ICD-10 code only (e.g., I10). Populated when the user selects a result from the dropdown. Assign to a Flow variable to use downstream.

property.name: selectedDescription
property.label: Selected ICD Description
property.description: The description text for the selected ICD-10 code (e.g., Essential (primary) hypertension). Populated alongside selectedCode when the user selects a result. Assign to a Flow variable to use downstream.
